title: botrychium virginianum var. simplex
intro: Botrychium virginianum var. simplex, also known as the American grape fern or simply grape fern, is a rare and unique variety of the grape fern species. It is a type of fern that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing swelling and promoting wound healing, as well as having antiviral and antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of the grape fern include teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to treat a variety of ailments.
